case.title: CERMINARO v. URBAN REDEVELOPMENT AUTH. OF PITTSBURGH

opinion.h1: CERMINARO v. URBAN REDEVELOPMENT AUTH. OF PITTSBURGH, 362 U.S. 457 (1960)
opinion.h4: CERMINARO v. URBAN REDEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY OF PITTSBURGH ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE WESTERN DISTRICT OF PENNSYLVANIA. No. 654, Misc. Decided April 25, 1960.
opinion.p: Theodore L. Hazlett, Jr. and David Stahl for appellees.
opinion.h4: CLEVELAND ELECTRIC ILLUMINATING CO. v. CITY OF EUCLID, 362 U.S. 457 (1960)
opinion.p: 362 U.S. 457 CLEVELAND ELECTRIC ILLUMINATING CO. v. CITY OF EUCLID, OHIO, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 740. Decided April 25, 1960.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Paul H. Torbet and John F. Ray, Jr. for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
